title: H^n8n^H H^Automation^H Specialist (Google Drive, QuickBooks, and Teams/Gmail Calendar Integration)

data.title: H^n8n^H H^Automation^H Specialist (Google Drive, QuickBooks, and Teams/Gmail Calendar Integration)
data.description:
We are hiring an experienced H^n8n^H H^automation^H specialist to build a self-hosted, production-ready workflow that H^automates^H intake via a Form, document handling via Google Drive, scheduling via MS Teams or Google Calendar, invoicing via Quickbooks, and follow-ups for an operations-based business.

This is not a Zapier or beginner H^n8n^H project. You must be comfortable working in a self-hosted H^n8n^H environment and building reliable, multi-step workflows with conditional logic, external integrations, and error handling.

High-Level Scope:

Public intake via H^n8n^H form or webhook

Conditional routing based on service type

Google Drive H^automation^H

    -Folder creation

    -File uploads

    -Permission assignment

QuickBooks Online H^automation^H

    -Project creation

    -Draft invoice generation

Calendar and Microsoft Teams meeting H^automation^H

H^Automated^H confirmation emails

Time-based logic (including a 48-hour pre-event trigger)

Readiness checklist form with required acknowledgments

Centralized audit log and error handling

Detailed requirements will be provided after selection.


Timeline and Budget:

Fixed price: $400 USD + $100 Potential Bonus

Timeline: 2 weeks

Week 1: MVP

Week 2/3: Final version after user testing

Bonus: $100 USD if final version is accepted by the end of Week 3


Requirements:

Proven experience with self-hosted H^n8n^H

Experience integrating:

Google Drive

QuickBooks Online

Calendars and Microsoft Teams

Comfortable with long-running workflows, wait logic, and error handling

Loom video/other recording format to provide a walkthrough of the final H^n8n^H workflow and point out potential points of failure and how to maintain the workflow.

How to Apply:

*MUST* The first word in your proposal should include the answer to the calculation of 2 + 2 = X to provide proof that you've read the posting.

Please include:

A brief summary of your H^n8n^H experience

One example of a complex H^automation^H you have built that includes most if not all of the integrations that are required in this job posting (Quickbooks, Google Drive, MS Teams / Google Calendar, emails with conditional time-based logic)

Confirmation you can meet the 2-week timeline

Generic proposals will be ignored.

title: Simple Make.com Scenario Setup Needed

data.title: Simple Make.com Scenario Setup Needed
data.description:
Hi,
I’m looking for someone experienced with Make.com to help me set up a very simple H^automation^H scenario. This is a small task and should be quick for someone who knows Make well.
What I need:
• Create one basic scenario
• Trigger from a form submission or webhook
• Send the data to another app such as Google Sheets or Airtable
• Test the scenario and confirm it runs correctly
I already have the apps connected. I just need help building the scenario and making sure it works properly.
Requirements:
• Experience with Make.com
• Able to complete today or within 24 hours
• Clear communication
If this goes well, I’ll have more small H^automation^H tasks.
Please send a short proposal with your Make experience.
Thanks.

opening.description:
We are building a modern, technology-enabled advisory firm and are looking for a systems-first operator to build our backend from the ground up.
This role is not marketing and not data entry.
You will design and implement the core operating system that runs our business.

Responsibilities
Build lead intake, qualification, and routing systems
Configure and customize CRM pipelines
Design automation flows using Zapier or Make
Integrate AI (LLMs) for:
Lead summaries
Call summaries
Deal analysis
Set up secure document workflows
Create SOPs and system documentation
Ensure everything is scalable, clean, and maintainable

Required Skills
Advanced Zapier or Make experience
CRM setup experience (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Pipedrive, or Airtable)
Practical experience integrating OpenAI / LLMs
Strong understanding of business workflows
Ability to work independently and think end-to-end
Excellent written English (documentation matters)

Nice to Have
Experience in finance, consulting, or advisory firms
Familiarity with data rooms and confidential workflows
Experience building multi-step pipelines

similarJobs.title: Script to process Rocket Solver .rsl file into parsable (.csv or .txt) format
similarJobs.description:
Rocket Solver is a public Poker solver for a No Limit Holdem, that can be used to compute Game Theory Optimal strategies. These strategic game trees are saved into their inhouse .rsl files. This file amongst other things, tells the user what an optimal strategy looks like at each node of the defined game tree.

I am a Professional Poker player (and former software engineer), who would like to export the strategies inside this file, and plug them into other more streamline tools I have built for studying Poker. Unfortunately Rocket Solver does not have a built in functionality to export the complete strategies into parsable formats. I have tried using AI to guide me on how to reverse engineer these files but have not had any success.

I would like to hire someone experienced at reverse engineering, to provide me a solution that reads these .rsl files and saves the strategies into a parsable format (.txt / .csv etc).

My guess is it isn't much work, but I have no experience doing any reverse engineering at all. Happy to discuss. I have provided a very simple example .rsl files.

similarJobs.title: AI UGC Video Generator - n8n Workflow
similarJobs.description:
Main Goal: Build a new n8n workflow that can automatically create 30–40 second product videos: 
The system will generate realistic product videos that show the item in use, with an 
optional presenter (real human face). We are in need of 2 different workflows.

Workflows must:

Accept product reference images and packaging files as input.

Identify the product using visuals, packaging text, or user-provided text.

Generate a script and visuals for a 30–40s video.

Use a tool capable of creating realistic, imperfect human faces.

Produce real, imperfect, professional-looking images and videos.

Automatically save the final UGC video to Google Drive.



Please find the task description in the PDF attached.

$10 fixed price
Fast turnaround required

similarJobs.description:
We are looking for a Salesforce Configuration Specialist with experience in Digital Engagement and WhatsApp Messaging to implement a pre-defined WhatsApp Outbound Messaging solution.

All functional design, documentation, and scope are already completed — the work required is mainly configuration and light development (Flows / Actions) inside Salesforce.

What you will do:

Please submit your proposal and if interested please contact me for detail requirements.

similarJobs.title: Microsoft 365 Solutions Architect Needed
similarJobs.description:
We’re looking for a a Microsoft 365 infrastructure architect to design and correctly configure a new Microsoft 365 tenant from the ground up.

This is not a Teams admin, SharePoint content, or helpdesk role.

Our team of ten works on-premises workstations. Only the founder operates inside a Cloud PC (already provisioned). Your role is to ensure secure identity, device management, and access control across this mixed environment—done cleanly, correctly, and without overkill.

If you value proper architecture, minimal attack surface, and systems that scale without needing to be rebuilt later, this role is for you.

Scope of Work
Identity & Access (Foundation)
Microsoft Entra ID tenant hardening
MFA strategy (including break-glass accounts)
Role-based admin access
Disable legacy authentication
Identity-first design across all workloads
Device Management (Microsoft Intune)
Intune setup (MDM + MAM) for on-prem workstations
BYOD vs corporate device strategy
Compliance and configuration profiles
App protection policies
Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android enrollment flows
Conditional Access & Security
Conditional Access policies (risk-based and device-based)
Geo-aware access controls (Australia / Philippines)
Enforce compliant-device access for users
Privileged access restrictions for admin roles
Microsoft Defender for Business baseline policies
Cloud PC (Founder-Only)
Review and harden existing Cloud PC configuration
Ensure isolation from personal devices and accounts
Validate Conditional Access alignment
No general Cloud PC rollout required
Teams & SharePoint (Governance Only)
Clean SharePoint site architecture
Permissions and access boundaries
Proper Teams and SharePoint structural governance
Retention, auditing, and lifecycle considerations
(No content creation or site building)

What Success Looks Like
Team works securely on on-prem workstations
Founder operates inside a locked-down Cloud PC
Conditional Access blocks non-compliant access automatically
Personal devices introduce minimal risk
Teams and SharePoint remain structured and controlled
Environment is future-ready for ISO 27001 / SOC 2
No architectural rework required later
Required Experience
Proven experience with Microsoft 365 Business Premium
Strong hands-on expertise with Microsoft Intune
Deep understanding of Conditional Access
Experience securing hybrid/on-prem device environments
Identity- and security-first mindset
Ability to clearly explain design decisions


Nice to Have
Zero Trust architecture experience
ISO 27001 or SOC 2 exposure
Microsoft certifications (MD-102, SC-300, etc.)

Important Notes
This is a fresh tenant
Cloud PC is founder-only, already established
Architecture quality and correctness matter more than speed

This Role Is NOT for You If
You primarily build Teams channels or SharePoint pages
Your focus is mailbox management or helpdesk support
You avoid identity, security, or Conditional Access topics
You prefer shortcuts over correct architecture

similarJobs.title: Google Workspace to Zoho Mail Migration Expert (Zoho One | Zero Downtime | Business Email)
similarJobs.description:
Google Workspace to Zoho Mail Migration Expert (Zoho One | Zero Downtime Required)
About Pillarcraft

Pillarcraft is a professional services and cloud solutions group operating across accounting, tax advisory, and technology-enabled business solutions. Our operations rely heavily on reliable, secure, and uninterrupted email communication with clients, partners, and government institutions.

We are transitioning our business email infrastructure from Google Workspace (Gmail) to Zoho Mail as part of our broader Zoho One ecosystem strategy. This migration must be executed professionally, securely, and with zero disruption to business operations.

Project Objective

Engage an experienced Zoho Mail and Google Workspace migration specialist to plan and execute a zero-downtime email migration, ensuring all historical emails, folders, aliases, and configurations are successfully moved and fully integrated into Zoho One.

This is a mission-critical infrastructure project, not a basic email setup task.

Scope of Work
1. Discovery & Planning

Review current Google Workspace setup (users, mailboxes, aliases, groups, forwarding rules).

Review existing domains and email routing configurations.

Confirm Zoho One and Zoho Mail readiness.

Design a detailed migration plan with clear timelines and risk mitigation.

2. Email Data Migration

Migrate all email data (Inbox, Sent, Drafts, folders, labels, attachments).

Use appropriate migration method (Zoho Migration Tool via IMAP or Google API).

Ensure no data loss and maintain mailbox integrity.

Validate migrated mailboxes against source accounts.

3. DNS & Email Authentication Configuration

Configure and validate:

MX records

SPF records

DKIM authentication

DMARC policy

Required CNAME/TXT records

Ensure proper email deliverability and spam protection.

Plan DNS cutover to avoid service disruption.

4. Zoho One Integration

Ensure Zoho Mail works seamlessly with:

Zoho CRM

Zoho Sign

Zoho Contracts

Zoho Bookings

Zoho WorkDrive

Validate outbound email sending from Zoho applications.

Align email authentication with Zoho CRM and automation workflows.

5. Testing & Go-Live

Test inbound and outbound email delivery.

Verify SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment.

Confirm user access, mobile/email client connectivity.

Monitor mail flow during and after cutover.

6. Post-Migration Support & Documentation

Provide post-migration support for at least 7–14 days.

Resolve user issues promptly.

Deliver complete documentation covering:

DNS configurations

Migration methodology

Admin credentials & access setup

Recommendations for future administration

Key Requirements

Proven experience migrating Google Workspace to Zoho Mail.

Strong knowledge of Zoho One ecosystem.

Deep understanding of DNS and email authentication.

Demonstrated ability to execute zero-downtime migrations.

Experience handling email for professional services firms.

Ability to work with sensitive business data and sign an NDA.

Clear communication and professional documentation.

Deliverables

Fully migrated email system in Zoho Mail.

Verified email authentication and deliverability.

Seamless integration with Zoho One applications.

Post-migration support period.

Final migration and configuration report.

How to Apply

Please include the following in your proposal:

Summary of your experience with Zoho Mail and Google Workspace migrations.

At least two recent migration projects you have completed.

Your proposed migration approach and timeline.

Your total project cost and what it includes.

Confirmation of post-migration support availability.

title: N8N Automation Expert Needed: Amazon & Walmart Daily Sales Dashboard Automation

opening.description:
Project Overview
I need an experienced n8n automation expert to complete and enhance automated daily dashboards that pull sales and advertising data from Amazon (Seller Central + Ads API) and Walmart (Seller + Ads API) into Google Sheets.
Current Status: I have already:

✅ Connected all API credentials (Amazon SP-API, Amazon Ads API, Walmart APIs)
✅ Built the first 6 nodes of the Amazon workflow (schedule trigger, date calculation, token generation, initial report requests)
✅ Created Google Sheets templates with headers

What I Need You to Do:
Complete both automation workflows to production-ready state with proper error handling, data validation, and documentation.

Scope of Work
1. Complete Amazon Dashboard Automation
Build on existing 6 nodes to create complete workflow:
Required Functionality:

✅ Daily automated trigger at 6:00 AM CST
✅ Pull data for "yesterday" with correct timezone handling (CST)
✅ Amazon Seller Central data (15-20 metrics):

Total orders, total revenue, units sold
Order status breakdown (shipped, pending, cancelled)
Average order value, returns/refunds
Product-level sales if feasible


✅ Amazon Ads data (15-20 metrics):

Ad spend, ad sales, ad orders
Impressions, clicks, CTR, CPC
ACoS, TACoS calculations
Campaign performance by type (SP, SB, SD if applicable)



Technical Requirements:

Report generation request → polling loop → download → parse
Handle both TSV (Seller) and compressed JSON (Ads) formats
Merge data from multiple sources
Calculate derived metrics (ACoS, TACoS, organic sales, conversion rates)
Write formatted data to Google Sheets
Implement retry logic for failed API calls
Add error notifications (email or webhook)
Include logging for debugging


2. Build Walmart Dashboard Automation
Create complete workflow from scratch (mirroring Amazon structure):
Required Functionality:

✅ Daily automated trigger at 6:15 AM CST (offset from Amazon)
✅ Pull data for "yesterday" with correct timezone handling
✅ Walmart Seller data (15-20 metrics):

Total orders, total revenue, units sold
Order status tracking
Product performance metrics
Fulfillment metrics (if available)


✅ Walmart Ads data (15-20 metrics):

Ad spend, ad sales, ad orders
Impressions, clicks, CTR, CPC
ACoS, TACoS calculations
Campaign-level performance



Technical Requirements:

Same architecture as Amazon workflow
Separate Google Sheets tab or spreadsheet
All error handling and retry logic
Data validation against Walmart dashboards


3. Data Validation & Testing
You must:

✅ Test both workflows thoroughly with manual execution
✅ Validate data accuracy against:

Amazon Seller Central Business Reports
Amazon Ads Campaign Manager
Walmart Seller Center
Walmart Advertising Console


✅ Ensure data variance is less than 2% from official dashboards
✅ Verify date alignment is correct (yesterday = yesterday)
✅ Test error handling by simulating failures
✅ Document any known limitations or edge cases


4. Documentation & Handoff
Deliverables:

✅ Complete, working n8n workflows (exportable JSON)
✅ Step-by-step documentation for:

How workflows operate
How to manually trigger if needed
How to troubleshoot common errors
Where to find logs


✅ Google Sheets with properly formatted data and formulas
✅ List of all metrics being pulled with definitions
✅ 7-day post-launch support for bug fixes


Required Skills & Experience
Must Have:

✅ Proven n8n expertise (3+ completed projects, portfolio required)
✅ E-commerce API experience (Amazon SP-API, Ads API, or Walmart APIs)
✅ JavaScript/JSON proficiency for data parsing and transformations
✅ Experience with:

Asynchronous API patterns (report generation → polling → download)
CSV/TSV parsing
GZIP/compressed data handling
Google Sheets API integration
Timezone conversions
OAuth token refresh flows


✅ Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
✅ Attention to data accuracy (e-commerce finance data must be precise)

Nice to Have:

Experience with Amazon Seller Central and Ads Console interfaces
Experience with Walmart Seller Center
Familiarity with e-commerce metrics (ACoS, TACoS, ROAS)
Previous automation work for Amazon/Walmart sellers


Project Timeline

Start: Immediately upon hire
Completion: 10-14 days maximum
Support period: 7 days post-launch for bug fixes

Milestones:
Day 1-3: Complete Amazon workflow (50% payment)
Day 4-6: Complete Walmart workflow + testing (40% payment)
Day 7-10: Documentation + validation (10% payment)

Your proposal MUST include:

Portfolio Links:

Link to at least 2-3 n8n workflows you've built (screenshots or exported JSON)
Any e-commerce API integration projects
Google Sheets automation examples


Relevant Experience:

Have you worked with Amazon SP-API or Ads API before? (Yes/No)
Have you worked with Walmart APIs before? (Yes/No)
How many n8n workflows have you built? (Approximate number)
Rate your n8n expertise: Beginner / Intermediate / Expert


Technical Approach:

Briefly describe how you would handle the polling/download cycle for Amazon reports
How would you ensure data accuracy matches official dashboards?
What's your strategy for error handling and retry logic? 
* I can provide initial workflow and node configuration.

info.title: N8N Automation Expert Needed: Amazon & Walmart Daily Sales Dashboard Automation

title: GHL Backend Architect: n8n Bidirectional Relational Mesh & API Logic

opening.description:
**ZCARE Project RFP: Medicare Command Center**

**Project Overview:**
ZCARE is centralizing operations for a Medicare agency into a GoHighLevel (GHL) "Command Center" on a $97/mo plan. We are NOT seeking a marketing/funnel builder. We require a **Systems Architect** to build a custom **Multi-Point-to-Multi-Point Relational Mesh**.

**Phase 0 Trial (Mandatory technical gate):**
This project begins with a **$200 Fixed-Fee, 24-hour Proof-of-Concept (POC)**. You must demonstrate the logic below via a Loom video or live technical demo within 24 hours of hire.

**Technical Requirements:**

1. **Deterministic Echo (Bidirectional Mesh):** When Record A is linked to Record B (via a custom field/ID), your system (n8n or custom API) must automatically create a reciprocal, clickable link on Record B back to Record A.
2. **Recursive Loop Prevention:** You must demonstrate robust logic (Source tagging, header filtering, or conditional "If/Else" nodes) to prevent infinite "ping-pong" updates during the bidirectional sync.
3. **Programmatic Binary Match:** Explain/demonstrate the logic to match 300+ legacy PDF filenames to specific GHL Contact IDs via API. Any mention of manual VA uploads is a disqualification.
4. **Dynamic Relational UI:** Use Custom Menu Links and URL parameters to create a "Relational View" capable of displaying 50+ associated records in a clean, filtered workspace.

**Ideal Tech Stack:**

* **n8n** (Highly Preferred)
* GHL v2 API
* JSON / Webhooks / Python (for heavy data reconciliation)

**The "ZCARE" Ground Rules:**

* Opportunities are for sales stages, NOT for relational data storage.
* If you claim that bidirectional many-to-many linking is a "platform limitation," you do not meet the requirements.
* We prioritize **Architectural Integrity** over "pretty" UI.


### **Final Polish Tips:**

1. **Skills Check:** Make sure **n8n** and **API Integration** are tagged.
2. **Screening Question:** (Add this if Upwork allows): *"Describe the specific n8n node or logic you would use to prevent an automated API update from triggering the same workflow again (infinite loop)."*

info.title: GHL Backend Architect: n8n Bidirectional Relational Mesh & API Logic

openJobs.title: GHL Backend Architect: n8n Bidirectional Relational Mesh & API Logic

similarJobs.title: WooCommerce Subscription Setup + Fix Email Notifications + Domain Connection
similarJobs.description:
Job Description
We are running a WordPress + WooCommerce website and require the following work completed properly and cleanly.
This is a live business website.

1. Subscription Functionality (Critical)
Important:
We have already purchased and installed WooCommerce Subscriptions. This must be used.
Required behaviour
Customers add products to cart as a normal one-off purchase
At checkout, customers can choose to convert the entire cart into a subscription
Subscription frequencies
Weekly
Fortnightly
Monthly
Key requirements
Subscription applies to the whole order, not individual products
Customer selects frequency at checkout
Automatic renewals using our existing payment gateway
Customers can manage subscriptions in “My Account”:
Pause
Change delivery frequency
Cancel
Clear confirmation messaging after checkout
Important
Do not convert products into subscription-only items
No alternative subscription plugins
No unstable custom code or hacks
2. Fix WooCommerce Email Notifications (Critical)
Order and subscription emails are currently unreliable.
We need:
Order confirmation emails → customers
New order notifications → admin
Subscription emails:
Renewal confirmation
Failed payment
Subscription activated / cancelled
Technical requirements
Configure SMTP properly (WP Mail SMTP or equivalent)
Connect to a reliable provider (Google Workspace / Outlook / SendGrid)
Ensure emails consistently deliver (not spam)
Test all email flows and confirm delivery
3. Connect Domain (GoDaddy → Hostinger)
The domain is registered with GoDaddy and hosting is with Hostinger.
Tasks:
Correctly point domain from GoDaddy to Hostinger
Update nameservers or DNS records as required
Ensure:
Website loads correctly
SSL works
Email setup is not broken by DNS changes
Minimal downtime required. Clear communication during DNS propagation.
Deliverables
Fully working cart-level subscription checkout
All WooCommerce and subscription emails sending reliably
Domain correctly connected and stable
Short handover note explaining:
Subscription setup
Email configuration
DNS changes made
Required Experience
Proven WooCommerce Subscriptions experience
SMTP / email delivery setup
DNS management (GoDaddy + Hostinger)
Careful work on live production sites
To Apply, You Must Answer:
Have you implemented cart-level subscriptions using WooCommerce Subscriptions before? (Yes/No + example)
How will you configure checkout to apply subscriptions to the full cart?
How will you ensure email reliability?
Have you connected GoDaddy domains to Hostinger before?

title: ClickFunnels, workflow Automation Expert Needed (GoHighLevel, n8n, Flutter, and PHP)

opening.description:
We’re looking for an experienced Workflow Automation Specialist to help us build, optimize, and maintain automations across our growth and operations stack.

This is a hands-on role working with real systems, APIs, and business workflows.

Tools & Technologies
GoHighLevel (GHL) – CRM workflows, triggers, pipelines, webhooks
n8n – advanced automation logic, API integrations, error handling
ManyReach – Email outreach automation
Reforce.ai – AI-powered lead engagement workflows
PHP – custom scripts, middleware, API endpoints, data processing
APIs, Webhooks, JSON, conditional logic

Responsibilities
Build and optimize end-to-end automation workflows
Develop and maintain custom PHP scripts to support integrations
Connect tools using APIs and webhooks
Troubleshoot, debug, and improve existing automations
Ensure data accuracy, reliability, and performance
Clearly document workflows and logic

Requirements
Strong experience with workflow automation (beyond basic tools)
Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel and n8n
Solid PHP development experience (REST APIs, backend logic)
Comfortable with JSON, APIs, webhooks, and conditional logic
Experience with outreach automation tools (ManyReach or similar)
Clear communicator with strong attention to detail

Nice to Have
Experience with AI-based workflows
Sales, marketing, or lead generation automation background
Experience scaling automations for growing teams

Project Type
Long-term / ongoing collaboration
Flexible hours
Paid hourly or per project (based on experience)

How to Apply Please include:
Brief summary of your automation and PHP experience
Tools you’ve worked with (be specific)
1–2 examples of complex workflows or integrations you’ve built
Your availability
If you enjoy building smart, reliable systems that actually work, we’d love to connect.

similarJobs.title: Script to process Rocket Solver .rsl file into parsable (.csv or .txt) format
similarJobs.description:
Rocket Solver is a public Poker solver for a No Limit Holdem, that can be used to compute Game Theory Optimal strategies. These strategic game trees are saved into their inhouse .rsl files. This file amongst other things, tells the user what an optimal strategy looks like at each node of the defined game tree.

I am a Professional Poker player (and former software engineer), who would like to export the strategies inside this file, and plug them into other more streamline tools I have built for studying Poker. Unfortunately Rocket Solver does not have a built in functionality to export the complete strategies into parsable formats. I have tried using AI to guide me on how to reverse engineer these files but have not had any success.

I would like to hire someone experienced at reverse engineering, to provide me a solution that reads these .rsl files and saves the strategies into a parsable format (.txt / .csv etc).

My guess is it isn't much work, but I have no experience doing any reverse engineering at all. Happy to discuss. I have provided a very simple example .rsl files.

title: Automation Engineer Needed for AI Receptionist Development

opening.description:
Role: Automation Engineer – AI Receptionist & Experience Systems

We are looking for an experienced Automation Engineer with deep proficiency in n8n and GoHighLevel (GHL) to help design and build an AI-powered receptionist system for healthcare and wellness businesses, starting with chiropractic and expanding into adjacent clinical niches.

This role is not about building a basic chatbot or call handler. The goal is to design and implement experience-driven automation systems that remove operational friction while preserving and enhancing trust, reassurance, and human connection throughout the customer journey.

You will work closely with our team to translate real business needs and experience design principles into reliable, scalable automation workflows. The AI receptionist you help build will act as the first point of contact for patients or clients, handling scheduling, intake, follow-up, and routing in a way that feels intentional, calm, and human-centered.

What You’ll Be Working On

Designing and implementing AI receptionist workflows using n8n as the orchestration layer and GHL as the CRM, funnel, and communications backbone.

Building intelligent call, SMS, and form-based flows that:

Capture and qualify inbound leads.

Schedule appointments dynamically.

Handle common questions and intake steps.

Escalate to humans when emotional nuance, clinical sensitivity, or uncertainty is detected.

Integrating AI models (voice and text) in ways that support clarity, reassurance, and trust, rather than replacing human judgment.

Designing systems that support the full client journey, not just the first touchpoint, including:

Pre-visit education and expectation setting.

Post-visit follow-up and adherence.

Ongoing communication loops that reduce no-shows and drop-off.

Creating workflows that return structured data to the business so owners and managers can understand:

Where clients are getting stuck.

Which touchpoints matter most.

How automation is impacting experience metrics, not just operational metrics.

How Experience Design Shapes This Role

Our philosophy is that automation should free humans to be more human, not remove them from the process. That means:

Low-empathy, repetitive tasks (scheduling, reminders, basic intake) are ideal for automation.

High-empathy moments (clinical questions, anxiety, decision-making) should be protected and routed to people.

Systems must be designed with clear escalation paths, tone control, and transparency so clients know when they are interacting with AI and feel confident doing so.

As an Automation Engineer on this project, you will be expected to think beyond “does it work?” and ask:

Does this reduce friction?

Does this improve clarity?

Does this increase trust?

Does this give staff more capacity to deliver a better in-person experience?

Required Skills and Experience

Strong hands-on experience with n8n, including complex multi-step workflows, branching logic, error handling, and external API integrations.

Strong working knowledge of GoHighLevel, including:

CRM objects and pipelines.

Campaigns and automations.

Webhooks and API usage.

Calendar and booking systems.

Experience integrating AI services (voice or text), including prompt design, variable handling, and context passing.

Comfort working with structured data and designing systems that return clean, actionable outputs.

Ability to reason through edge cases and failure modes, especially in customer-facing automation.

Clear communication skills and comfort collaborating closely with non-technical stakeholders.

Nice-to-Have Experience

Prior work in healthcare, wellness, or service-based businesses.

Familiarity with experience design concepts such as customer journey mapping, service blueprints, or human-centered design.

Experience building systems where trust, privacy, and emotional context matter.

Understanding of HIPAA-adjacent constraints (even if not fully regulated systems).

What Success Looks Like

The AI receptionist reduces operational load without increasing client frustration.

Businesses report improved responsiveness, fewer missed opportunities, and calmer internal workflows.

Clients feel guided and reassured rather than processed.

Owners gain visibility into their operations and client experience through clean data and feedback loops.

The system scales across multiple clinics without losing consistency or quality.

Why This Role Matters

This work sits at the intersection of automation, AI, and experience design. We are not building tools for their own sake. We are building systems that help business owners move out of survival mode and into a role where they can focus on care, coaching, and transformation.

If you are passionate about automation, enjoy building thoughtful systems, and want your work to have a direct impact on how real people experience healthcare and wellness services, we would love to talk.

similarJobs.title: SAP HCM / ABAP / Cloud Integration Experts for German Enterprise Projects in Bangalore
similarJobs.description:
JoinNOW is a company that connects German businesses with AI-vetted tech professionals and manages hiring, compliance, and onboarding for enterprise clients in the DACH region. They are expanding their India-based SAP delivery capability for ongoing German enterprise-grade SAP projects, with operations centered in Bangalore.

We are assisting JoinNOW in identifying senior SAP experts based in India for full-time collaboration, working from Bangalore (on-site or hybrid).

We're Looking For:
- SAP HCM Expert (German HR/payroll compliance exposure is a plus)
- SAP Cloud Integration Specialist (CPI / PI / PO)
- SAP ABAP Developer
- Any SAP consultant with deep enterprise-level implementation experience

Ideal Candidate Profile:
1. Based in India, open to working from Bangalore
2. Experience working with German or DACH-region enterprise clients
3. Familiar with German delivery standards — structured documentation, precision, and timeline reliability
4. Strong communication in English (German language skills are welcome but optional)
5. Looking for long-term enterprise engagement

When Applying, Please Include
- Your SAP specialization(s)
- Example of German/DACH client work you've done
- Confirmation that you are open to Bangalore-based full-time engagement
- Your expected monthly rate range for enterprise collaboration

This initiative aims to form long-term SAP delivery teams supporting German enterprise accounts through JoinNOW.
